ansi_fast.c(3) Library Functions Manual ansi_fast.c(3)

NAME

ansi_fast.c

SYNOPSIS

Functions


char * append_truecolor_fg (char *dst, uint8_t r, uint8_t g, uint8_t b)
char * append_truecolor_bg (char *dst, uint8_t r, uint8_t g, uint8_t b)
char * append_truecolor_fg_bg (char *dst, uint8_t fg_r, uint8_t fg_g, uint8_t fg_b, uint8_t bg_r, uint8_t bg_g, uint8_t bg_b)
void ansi_rle_init (ansi_rle_context_t *ctx, char *buffer, size_t capacity, ansi_color_mode_t mode)
void ansi_rle_add_pixel (ansi_rle_context_t *ctx, uint8_t r, uint8_t g, uint8_t b, char ascii_char)
void ansi_rle_finish (ansi_rle_context_t *ctx)
void ansi_fast_init (void)
void ansi_fast_init_256color (void)
char * append_256color_fg (char *dst, uint8_t color_index)
char * append_256color_bg (char *dst, uint8_t color_index)
uint8_t rgb_to_256color (uint8_t r, uint8_t g, uint8_t b)
void ansi_fast_init_16color (void)
char * append_16color_fg (char *dst, uint8_t color_index)
char * append_16color_bg (char *dst, uint8_t color_index)
uint8_t rgb_to_16color (uint8_t r, uint8_t g, uint8_t b)
void get_16color_rgb (uint8_t color_index, uint8_t *r, uint8_t *g, uint8_t *b)
uint8_t rgb_to_16color_dithered (int r, int g, int b, int x, int y, int width, int height, rgb_error_t *error_buffer)
char * append_color_fg_for_mode (char *dst, uint8_t r, uint8_t g, uint8_t b, terminal_color_mode_t mode)

Function Documentation

void ansi_fast_init (void )

Definition at line 199 of file ansi_fast.c.

199                           {
200   // Initialize the dec3 cache used by truecolor functions
201   ascii_simd_init();
202 }

void
  ansi_fast_init_16color (void )

279                                   {
280   if (!lifecycle_init(&g_color16_lc, "ansi_16color")) {
281     return; // Already initialized
282   }
283   do_init_16color();
284 }

void
  ansi_rle_add_pixel (ansi_rle_context_t * ctx, uint8_t r, uint8_t g, uint8_t b,
  char ascii_char)


Definition at line 143 of file ansi_fast.c.


143                                                                                                    {
144   // Check if we need to emit a new SGR sequence
145   bool color_changed = ctx->first_pixel || (r != ctx->last_r) || (g != ctx->last_g) || (b != ctx->last_b);
146 
147   if (color_changed) {
148     if (ctx->length + 40 >= ctx->capacity) {
149       // Log when we can't add a color change due to buffer capacity
150       log_warn_every(US_PER_SEC_INT, "RLE_CAPACITY: Cannot add SGR at length=%zu, capacity=%zu (need 40 bytes)",
151                      ctx->length, ctx->capacity);
152     }
153   }
154 
155   if (color_changed && (ctx->length + 40 < ctx->capacity)) { // Reserve 40 bytes for SGR (FG+BG max is 38)
156     char *pos = ctx->buffer + ctx->length;
157 
158     switch (ctx->mode) {
159     case ANSI_MODE_FOREGROUND:
160       pos = append_truecolor_fg(pos, r, g, b);
161       break;
162     case ANSI_MODE_BACKGROUND:
163       pos = append_truecolor_bg(pos, r, g, b);
164       break;
165     case ANSI_MODE_FOREGROUND_BACKGROUND:
166       // For FG+BG mode, use a default background (black) or implement dual-color logic
167       pos = append_truecolor_fg_bg(pos, r, g, b, 0, 0, 0);
168       break;
169     }
170 
171     ctx->length = (size_t)(pos - ctx->buffer);
172     ctx->last_r = r;
173     ctx->last_g = g;
174     ctx->last_b = b;
175     ctx->first_pixel = false;
176   }
177 
178   // Add the ASCII character
179   if (ctx->length < ctx->capacity - 1) {
180     ctx->buffer[ctx->length++] = ascii_char;
181   }
182 }






References append_truecolor_bg(),
    append_truecolor_fg(), and append_truecolor_fg_bg().


Referenced by image_print_color().






void
  ansi_rle_finish (ansi_rle_context_t * ctx)


Definition at line 185 of file ansi_fast.c.


185                                               {
186   // Add reset sequence (requires 4 bytes + 1 for null terminator = 5 bytes total)
187   if (ctx->length + 5 <= ctx->capacity) {
188     SAFE_MEMCPY(ctx->buffer + ctx->length, 4, "\033[0m", 4);
189     ctx->length += 4;
190   }
191 
192   // Null terminate
193   if (ctx->length < ctx->capacity) {
194     ctx->buffer[ctx->length] = '\0';
195   }
196 }






Referenced by image_print_color().






void
  ansi_rle_init (ansi_rle_context_t * ctx, char * buffer, size_t capacity,
  ansi_color_mode_t mode)


Definition at line 130 of file ansi_fast.c.


130                                                                                                    {
131   ctx->buffer = buffer;
132   ctx->capacity = capacity;
133   ctx->length = 0;
134   ctx->mode = mode;
135   ctx->first_pixel = true;
136   // Initialize with impossible color values to force first SGR
137   ctx->last_r = 0xFF;
138   ctx->last_g = 0xFF;
139   ctx->last_b = 0xFF;
140 }






Referenced by image_print_color().






char
  * append_16color_bg (char * dst, uint8_t color_index)


Definition at line 302 of file ansi_fast.c.


302                                                         {
303   // Ensure initialization before use
304   ansi_fast_init_16color();
305 
306   if (color_index >= 16) {
307     color_index = 0; // Default to black background
308   }
309 
310   const char *color_str = color16_bg_strings[color_index];
311   while (*color_str) {
312     *dst++ = *color_str++;
313   }
314 
315   return dst;
316 }

286                                                         {
287   // Ensure initialization before use

289 
290   if (color_index >= 16) {

292   }
293 
294   const char *color_str = color16_fg_strings[color_index];

char
  * append_color_fg_for_mode (char * dst, uint8_t r, uint8_t g, uint8_t b,
  terminal_color_mode_t mode)


Definition at line 467 of file ansi_fast.c.


467                                                                                                        {
468   switch (mode) {
469   case COLOR_MODE_TRUECOLOR:
470     return append_truecolor_fg(dst, r, g, b);
471 
472   case COLOR_MODE_256_COLOR: {
473     uint8_t color_index = rgb_to_256color(r, g, b);
474     return append_256color_fg(dst, color_index);
475   }
476 
477   case COLOR_MODE_16_COLOR: {
478     uint8_t color_index = rgb_to_16color(r, g, b);
479     return append_16color_fg(dst, color_index);
480   }
481 
482   case COLOR_MODE_NONE:
483   case COLOR_MODE_AUTO:
484   default:
485     // No color output for monochrome mode or auto mode (fallback)
486     return dst;
487   }
488 }






References append_16color_fg(),
    append_256color_fg(), append_truecolor_fg(),
    rgb_to_16color(), and rgb_to_256color().






char
  * append_truecolor_bg (char * dst, uint8_t r, uint8_t g, uint8_t b)


Definition at line 57 of file ansi_fast.c.


57                                                                       {
58   // Ensure dec3 cache is initialized
59   if (!g_dec3_cache.dec3_initialized) {
60     init_dec3();
61   }
62 
63   SAFE_MEMCPY(dst, 19, "\033[48;2;", 7);
64   dst += 7;
65 
66   SAFE_MEMCPY(dst, 12, g_dec3_cache.dec3_table[r].s, g_dec3_cache.dec3_table[r].len);
67   dst += g_dec3_cache.dec3_table[r].len;
68   *dst++ = ';';
69 
70   SAFE_MEMCPY(dst, 8, g_dec3_cache.dec3_table[g].s, g_dec3_cache.dec3_table[g].len);
71   dst += g_dec3_cache.dec3_table[g].len;
72   *dst++ = ';';
73 
74   SAFE_MEMCPY(dst, 4, g_dec3_cache.dec3_table[b].s, g_dec3_cache.dec3_table[b].len);
75   dst += g_dec3_cache.dec3_table[b].len;
76   *dst++ = 'm';
77 
78   return dst;
79 }

char
  * append_truecolor_fg (char * dst, uint8_t r, uint8_t g, uint8_t b)


Definition at line 27 of file ansi_fast.c.


27                                                                       {
28   // Ensure dec3 cache is initialized
29   if (!g_dec3_cache.dec3_initialized) {
30     init_dec3();
31   }
32 
33   // Static prefix - 7 bytes
34   SAFE_MEMCPY(dst, 19, "\033[38;2;", 7);
35   dst += 7;
36 
37   // Red component + semicolon
38   SAFE_MEMCPY(dst, 12, g_dec3_cache.dec3_table[r].s, g_dec3_cache.dec3_table[r].len);
39   dst += g_dec3_cache.dec3_table[r].len;
40   *dst++ = ';';
41 
42   // Green component + semicolon
43   SAFE_MEMCPY(dst, 8, g_dec3_cache.dec3_table[g].s, g_dec3_cache.dec3_table[g].len);
44   dst += g_dec3_cache.dec3_table[g].len;
45   *dst++ = ';';
46 
47   // Blue component + suffix
48   SAFE_MEMCPY(dst, 4, g_dec3_cache.dec3_table[b].s, g_dec3_cache.dec3_table[b].len);
49   dst += g_dec3_cache.dec3_table[b].len;
50   *dst++ = 'm';
51 
52   return dst;
53 }

char
  * append_truecolor_fg_bg (char * dst, uint8_t fg_r, uint8_t fg_g, uint8_t
  fg_b, uint8_t bg_r, uint8_t bg_g, uint8_t bg_b)


Definition at line 83 of file ansi_fast.c.


84                                            {
85   // Ensure dec3 cache is initialized
86   if (!g_dec3_cache.dec3_initialized) {
87     init_dec3();
88   }
89 
90   SAFE_MEMCPY(dst, 38, "\033[38;2;", 7);
91   dst += 7;
92 
93   // Foreground RGB (remaining: 31 bytes max)
94   SAFE_MEMCPY(dst, 31, g_dec3_cache.dec3_table[fg_r].s, g_dec3_cache.dec3_table[fg_r].len);
95   dst += g_dec3_cache.dec3_table[fg_r].len;
96   *dst++ = ';';
97 
98   // Remaining: 27 bytes max
99   SAFE_MEMCPY(dst, 27, g_dec3_cache.dec3_table[fg_g].s, g_dec3_cache.dec3_table[fg_g].len);
100   dst += g_dec3_cache.dec3_table[fg_g].len;
101   *dst++ = ';';
102 
103   // Remaining: 23 bytes max
104   SAFE_MEMCPY(dst, 23, g_dec3_cache.dec3_table[fg_b].s, g_dec3_cache.dec3_table[fg_b].len);
105   dst += g_dec3_cache.dec3_table[fg_b].len;
106 
107   // Background RGB (remaining: 20 bytes max)
108   SAFE_MEMCPY(dst, 20, ";48;2;", 6);
109   dst += 6;
110 
111   // Remaining: 14 bytes max
112   SAFE_MEMCPY(dst, 14, g_dec3_cache.dec3_table[bg_r].s, g_dec3_cache.dec3_table[bg_r].len);
113   dst += g_dec3_cache.dec3_table[bg_r].len;
114   *dst++ = ';';
115 
116   // Remaining: 10 bytes max
117   SAFE_MEMCPY(dst, 10, g_dec3_cache.dec3_table[bg_g].s, g_dec3_cache.dec3_table[bg_g].len);
118   dst += g_dec3_cache.dec3_table[bg_g].len;
119   *dst++ = ';';
120 
121   // Remaining: 6 bytes max
122   SAFE_MEMCPY(dst, 6, g_dec3_cache.dec3_table[bg_b].s, g_dec3_cache.dec3_table[bg_b].len);
123   dst += g_dec3_cache.dec3_table[bg_b].len;
124   *dst++ = 'm';
125 
126   return dst;
127 }

void
  get_16color_rgb (uint8_t color_index, uint8_t * r, uint8_t * g, uint8_t *
  b)


Definition at line 361 of file ansi_fast.c.


361                                                                               {
362   // Same color table as rgb_to_16color()
363   static const uint8_t ansi_colors[16][3] = {
364       {0, 0, 0},       // 0: Black
365       {128, 0, 0},     // 1: Dark Red
366       {0, 128, 0},     // 2: Dark Green
367       {128, 128, 0},   // 3: Dark Yellow (Brown)
368       {0, 0, 128},     // 4: Dark Blue
369       {128, 0, 128},   // 5: Dark Magenta
370       {0, 128, 128},   // 6: Dark Cyan
371       {192, 192, 192}, // 7: Light Gray
372       {128, 128, 128}, // 8: Dark Gray
373       {255, 0, 0},     // 9: Bright Red
374       {0, 255, 0},     // 10: Bright Green
375       {255, 255, 0},   // 11: Bright Yellow
376       {0, 0, 255},     // 12: Bright Blue
377       {255, 0, 255},   // 13: Bright Magenta
378       {0, 255, 255},   // 14: Bright Cyan
379       {255, 255, 255}  // 15: White
380   };
381 
382   if (color_index >= 16) {
383     color_index = 7; // Default to light gray
384   }
385 
386   *r = ansi_colors[color_index][0];
387   *g = ansi_colors[color_index][1];
388   *b = ansi_colors[color_index][2];
389 }






Referenced by
    image_print_16color_dithered_with_background(), and
    rgb_to_16color_dithered().






uint8_t
  rgb_to_16color (uint8_t r, uint8_t g, uint8_t b)


Definition at line 318 of file ansi_fast.c.


318                                                         {
319   // Convert RGB to the closest 16-color ANSI color
320   // This uses a simple distance-based approach
321 
322   // Define the 16 ANSI colors in RGB
323   static const uint8_t ansi_colors[16][3] = {
324       {0, 0, 0},       // 0: Black
325       {128, 0, 0},     // 1: Dark Red
326       {0, 128, 0},     // 2: Dark Green
327       {128, 128, 0},   // 3: Dark Yellow (Brown)
328       {0, 0, 128},     // 4: Dark Blue
329       {128, 0, 128},   // 5: Dark Magenta
330       {0, 128, 128},   // 6: Dark Cyan
331       {192, 192, 192}, // 7: Light Gray
332       {128, 128, 128}, // 8: Dark Gray
333       {255, 0, 0},     // 9: Bright Red
334       {0, 255, 0},     // 10: Bright Green
335       {255, 255, 0},   // 11: Bright Yellow
336       {0, 0, 255},     // 12: Bright Blue
337       {255, 0, 255},   // 13: Bright Magenta
338       {0, 255, 255},   // 14: Bright Cyan
339       {255, 255, 255}  // 15: White
340   };
341 
342   uint8_t best_match = 0;
343   int min_distance = INT_MAX;
344 
345   for (int i = 0; i < 16; i++) {
346     int dr = (int)r - (int)ansi_colors[i][0];
347     int dg = (int)g - (int)ansi_colors[i][1];
348     int db = (int)b - (int)ansi_colors[i][2];
349     int distance = dr * dr + dg * dg + db * db;
350 
351     if (distance < min_distance) {
352       min_distance = distance;
353       best_match = i;
354     }
355   }
356 
357   return best_match;
358 }






Referenced by append_color_fg_for_mode(),
    colorscheme_compile_scheme(), image_print_16color(),
    rgb_to_16color_dithered(), and
    rgb_to_16color_halfblocks_scalar().






uint8_t
  rgb_to_16color_dithered (int r, int g, int b, int x, int y, int width, int
  height, rgb_error_t * error_buffer)


Definition at line 392 of file ansi_fast.c.


392                                                                                                                      {
393   // Add accumulated error from previous pixels
394   if (error_buffer) {
395     // Use size_t for index calculation to prevent integer overflow on large images
396     size_t error_idx = (size_t)y * (size_t)width + (size_t)x;
397     r += error_buffer[error_idx].r;
398     g += error_buffer[error_idx].g;
399     b += error_buffer[error_idx].b;
400 
401     // Reset error for this pixel
402     error_buffer[error_idx].r = 0;
403     error_buffer[error_idx].g = 0;
404     error_buffer[error_idx].b = 0;
405   }
406 
407   // Clamp values to [0, 255]
408   uint8_t r_clamped = clamp_rgb((int)r);
409   uint8_t g_clamped = clamp_rgb((int)g);
410   uint8_t b_clamped = clamp_rgb((int)b);
411 
412   // Find the closest 16-color match
413   uint8_t closest_color = rgb_to_16color(r_clamped, g_clamped, b_clamped);
414 
415   // Calculate quantization error if dithering is enabled
416   if (error_buffer) {
417     uint8_t actual_r, actual_g, actual_b;
418     get_16color_rgb(closest_color, &actual_r, &actual_g, &actual_b);
419 
420     int error_r = r - (int)actual_r;
421     int error_g = g - (int)actual_g;
422     int error_b = b - (int)actual_b;
423 
424     // Distribute error using Floyd-Steinberg weights:
425     //     * 7/16
426     // 3/16 5/16 1/16
427 
428     // Error to right pixel (x+1, y)
429     // Use size_t for all index calculations to prevent integer overflow
430     if (x + 1 < width) {
431       size_t right_idx = (size_t)y * (size_t)width + (size_t)(x + 1);
432       error_buffer[right_idx].r += (error_r * 7) / 16;
433       error_buffer[right_idx].g += (error_g * 7) / 16;
434       error_buffer[right_idx].b += (error_b * 7) / 16;
435     }
436 
437     // Error to pixels on next row (y+1)
438     if (y + 1 < height) {
439       // Bottom-left pixel (x-1, y+1)
440       if (x - 1 >= 0) {
441         size_t bl_idx = (size_t)(y + 1) * (size_t)width + (size_t)(x - 1);
442         error_buffer[bl_idx].r += (error_r * 3) / 16;
443         error_buffer[bl_idx].g += (error_g * 3) / 16;
444         error_buffer[bl_idx].b += (error_b * 3) / 16;
445       }
446 
447       // Bottom pixel (x, y+1)
448       size_t bottom_idx = (size_t)(y + 1) * (size_t)width + (size_t)x;
449       error_buffer[bottom_idx].r += (error_r * 5) / 16;
450       error_buffer[bottom_idx].g += (error_g * 5) / 16;
451       error_buffer[bottom_idx].b += (error_b * 5) / 16;
452 
453       // Bottom-right pixel (x+1, y+1)
454       if (x + 1 < width) {
455         size_t br_idx = (size_t)(y + 1) * (size_t)width + (size_t)(x + 1);
456         error_buffer[br_idx].r += (error_r * 1) / 16;
457         error_buffer[br_idx].g += (error_g * 1) / 16;
458         error_buffer[br_idx].b += (error_b * 1) / 16;
459       }
460     }
461   }
462 
463   return closest_color;
464 }






References get_16color_rgb(), and
  rgb_to_16color().


Referenced by image_print_16color_dithered(), and
    image_print_16color_dithered_with_background().






uint8_t
  rgb_to_256color (uint8_t r, uint8_t g, uint8_t b)


Definition at line 238 of file ansi_fast.c.


238                                                          {
239   // Map to 6x6x6 color cube (216 colors) + grayscale ramp
240 
241   // Check if it's close to grayscale
242   int avg = (r + g + b) / 3;
243   int gray_diff = abs(r - avg) + abs(g - avg) + abs(b - avg);
244 
245   if (gray_diff < 30) {
246     // Use grayscale ramp (colors 232-255)
247     int gray_level = (avg * 23) / 255;
248     return (uint8_t)(232 + gray_level);
249   }
250 
251   // Use 6x6x6 color cube (colors 16-231)
252   int r6 = (r * 5) / 255;
253   int g6 = (g * 5) / 255;
254   int b6 = (b * 5) / 255;
255 
256   return (uint8_t)(16 + (r6 * 36) + (g6 * 6) + b6);
257 }






Referenced by append_color_fg_for_mode(),
    colorscheme_compile_scheme(), and
    rgb_to_256color_halfblocks_scalar().
